name: Crispy Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together. Add in Measure 1 condensed milk, sifted flour, cornflour, and salt, then add Measure 1 coconut. Mix well.
2. Roll into small balls and press flat onto a greased baking tray.
3. Before cooking, place topping on each biscuit. Mix Measure 2 condensed milk, coconut, and mixed fruit.
4. Put about half of the mixture in the top of each biscuit.
5. Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 10 - 15 minutes.
Makes about 24.
